name: Enigma Avatar
description: On-screen desktop companion: a floating, click-through 3D avatar (glTF/GLB/VRM/FBX) with procedural idle, spring-bone hair/tail physics, facial blink + lip-sync, and emotes. Driven via the avatar_express MCP tool over a local bus.
author: Enigma AI Engine
prompt: Enigma Avatar is the on-screen desktop companion — a floating 3D character on the user's desktop. It is a VISUAL layer with no [CMD] commands; you drive it with the `avatar_express` MCP tool to give body language as you reply. Emotions: happy, talk, wag, nod, shake, sad, alert (e.g. 'talk' while explaining, 'wag' when pleased, 'nod'/'shake' for yes/no, 'alert' to get attention). It lip-syncs and uses talking body language when Modkit speaks (Kokoro TTS). Safe no-op if the overlay/bus isn't running.
